Iga Swiatek struggles raise concern amid Miami Open defeat
description: Iga Swiatek’s Miami Open loss has raised serious questions about her form and mental state. Experts like Rennae Stubbs and Caitlin Thompson believe her psychologist Daria Abramowicz’s role needs review. Swiatek herself admits tennis feels complicated right now. With no recent titles and visible struggles, her team may need changes to help her return to top form.

description: A growing outbreak of meningococcal meningitis in the UK, linked to young people and a specific event, has led to serious illness and deaths. The rapid escalation of symptoms, from fever and headache to life-threatening conditions, highlights the critical need for early awareness and prompt medical intervention. Authorities are responding with vaccinations and antibiotics to contain the spread.

Trump admin sues Harvard University over Jewish students’ civil rights
description: The Trump administration has sued Harvard University. The lawsuit alleges the university violated Jewish students' civil rights. This action is part of a broader campaign against the Ivy League school. The government claims Harvard ignored campus hostility and failed to enforce anti-harassment rules. The suit seeks to compel compliance with civil rights law and recover federal funds.

Watch: Australian PM Albanese heckled at Eid prayers in Sydney over support for Israel
description: Tensions flared at an Eid prayer gathering in Western Sydney as a few attendees heckled Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke, demanding their removal. Shouts of "genocide supporters" echoed, reflecting community anger over the government's Gaza response and Islamophobia.

title: Google announces it is shutting down Firebase Studio, less than a year after its launch
description: Google is shutting down its Firebase Studio AI workspace on March 22, 2027, less than a year after its April 2025 launch. The company is consolidating its AI developer offerings, moving lessons learned into Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity. Core Firebase services remain unaffected, with a year-long transition period for users.

title: What’s going on between Luka Dončić and Anamaria Goltes? Custody battle explained
description: NBA star Luka Dončić and partner Anamaria Goltes are embroiled in a complex international custody battle for their two daughters, born in the US and Slovenia. The split, reportedly due to Dončić's limited time with his children during the NBA season, has led to legal filings in both California and Slovenia. Courts are now determining jurisdiction in this high-profile dispute.

title: Eid-ul-Fitr: Wishes, messages, quotes, greetings & images for sharing
description: Eid-ul-Fitr has arrived, marking the end of Ramadan with joyous celebrations.  This guide offers a collection of heartfelt, fun, and spiritual messages to share with loved ones via WhatsApp and social media.

title: Fuel, food and finance: How US-Iran war might spill into your monthly household bills
description: Global conflicts, from the Middle East to Ukraine, are directly impacting Indian households. Expect higher grocery bills due to rising LPG, cooking oil, and pulse prices. Commuting costs are increasing with fuel surcharges on flights. Even education abroad and consumer electronics are becoming more expensive, while stock market losses affect savings. The ripple effects are undeniable.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called for Meta's 'next frontier’, company shuts down Horizon world
description: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform, a significant metaverse investment, struggled to gain traction and will transition to a mobile-only experience. This move aims to streamline Meta's VR offerings and focus development efforts.
